rationale: Gov't Code §2306.030 governs board officer selection and duties for a state board. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.030. PRESIDING OFFICER; OTHER OFFICERS. (a) The governor shall designate a member of the board as the presiding officer of the board to serve in that capacity at the will of the governor.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
